iron_duchy.name: The Iron Duchy
iron_duchy.description: A militaristic nation ruled by an iron-fisted duke. Values strength and loyalty.

frontier_authority.name: The Frontier Authority
frontier_authority.description: Governing body that maintains law and order at the edges of civilization.

scholars_order.name: The Scholars' Order
scholars_order.description: An ancient order dedicated to knowledge, magic, and the preservation of lore.

merchant_union.name: The Merchant Union
merchant_union.description: A powerful trade guild controlling commerce across the realm.

thieves_circle.name: The Thieves' Circle
thieves_circle.description: A shadowy network of rogues, smugglers, and information brokers.
